statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); if [ -n "$used" ]; then printf "%s | ctx: %.0f%% used" "$model" "$used"; else printf "%s" "$model"; fi

_comment: Minimal shared Claude settings. Transport is chosen by the launcher wrapper (claude-wrapper, ca-wrapper, ct-wrapper).
